label: Injury props
description: Physical properties of an injury-type hediff such as bleed rate and pain coefficient.

becomeRotten.label: Become rotten
becomeRotten.description: Severity threshold at which the injury becomes infected/rotten. Reaching this value triggers infection mechanics.

bleedRate.label: Bleed rate
bleedRate.description: Base bleed rate contributed by this injury per severity point. Added to the pawn's total bleed rate.

painPerSeverity.label: Pain per severity
painPerSeverity.description: Pain added per unit of severity. Total pain contribution equals this value multiplied by current severity.

destroyBodyPartOnRemoval.label: Destroy body part on removal
destroyBodyPartOnRemoval.description: If true, the affected body part is destroyed when this injury hediff is removed.
